infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: SafeHer requires your location to share your real-time position with your emergency contacts when you trigger an SOS.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: SafeHer requires your location to show where you are and recommend safe routes.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: SafeHer needs access to your location in the background to ensure your emergency contacts can find you when your screen is off during an SOS.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: SafeHer accesses your contacts to let you quickly pick emergency contacts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: SafeHer needs microphone access to optionally record audio evidence during an SOS and for the fake call feature.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SafeHer requires camera access to capture quick photo evidence when SOS is triggered.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: SafeHer uses biometric authentication to easily lock and unlock your app.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow SafeHer to access your location in the background to share live tracking during an SOS.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SafeHer to take photos as evidence during an emergency.
